caption: Solar tab — vitals + climate + peak load + forecast accuracy
Outdoor tab — weather, tides, marine, sunset, sky tonight, meteor showers
Safety tab — earthquakes, storms, UV & heat, air quality
Travel tab — trip planner, border wait times, fuel prices with live Pemex data
Community tab — events, HOA activities, news, Spanish practice
Solar Vitals — SoC, PV per string, load breakdown, per-AC override, per-room temp/humidity
Room Climate History — 24h/3d/7d temp + humidity with hover crosshair
Water Tank — gallons + days-remaining projection with tiered warning bar
Peak Load — rolling 30-day max simultaneous house load
AC vs PV Overlay — 24h of PV production against smart_ac consumption
Sky Tonight — naked-eye planets tonight + moon phase, computed locally
Settings → System — location map picker + external service URLs and tokens
Settings → Notifications — per-source enable, quiet hours, test-fire, history + replay
Settings → HA Integrations — per-widget entity pickers with live values from Home Assistant
Settings → Rotation — fullscreen 'screensaver' widget rotation with per-step dwell
Rotation mode — full-screen kiosk view walking through configured widgets
